headline: eBay Launches 'The NYC Edit,' Revealing What New York's Most 'In-the-Know' Tastemakers Are Selling and Buying
summary: Today, eBay unveiled The NYC Edit — an online editorial guide highlighting what style insiders in New York are buying and selling on eBay, featuring curated selections and insights from some of the city's most in-the-know tastemakers.
